# Titan X5-B GPU — Corporate Contributor License Agreement

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement ("Corporate CLA") sets
out the terms under which the entity identified below ("You",
"Contributor", or "Company") grants rights to Adhiraj
("Maintainer", "we", or "us") for contributions
to the Titan X5-B GPU project (the "Project").

## 1. Definitions

- **"Company"** means the entity identified in Section 8 below.

- **"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship, including
  any modifications or additions to existing work, that is
  intentionally submitted by an employee or agent of the Company to
  the Project for inclusion.

- **"Submitted"** means any form of electronic, verbal, or written
  communication sent to the Maintainer or the Project.

- **"Work"** means the Titan X5-B GPU hardware design, including all
  source code, testbenches, documentation, and related materials.

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, the Company
hereby grants to the Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive,
no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to:

1. Reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly
   perform, sublicense, and distribute the Company's Contributions and
   such derivative works.

2. To license the Work (including the Company's Contributions) under
   any terms the Maintainer chooses, including but not limited to:
   - The CERN-OHL-S-2.0 open source license
   - A commercial license agreement
   - Any future license the Maintainer may choose

## 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, the Company
hereby grants to the Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive,
no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license to make, have made,
use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Work,
where such license applies only to those patent claims licensable by
the Company that are necessarily infringed by the Company's
Contribution(s) alone or by combination of the Company's
Contribution(s) with the Work.

## 4. Company Represents and Warrants That:

1. The Company is a legally recognized entity in good standing in its
   jurisdiction of organization.

2. The person signing this Agreement has the legal authority to bind
   the Company to its terms.

3. The Company is the sole author of each of its Contributions and
   has the legal right to grant the licenses in Sections 2 and 3.

4. Each of the Company's Contributions is original work (or, if not,
   the Company has the right to submit it under the licenses above).

5. The Company's Contributions do not, to the best of its knowledge,
   infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party.

6. The Company is not aware of any pending or threatened legal action
   that would affect the validity of its Contributions or the
   Maintainer's right to use them.

7. Each employee or agent of the Company who submits a Contribution
   on the Company's behalf has the authority to do so and is acting
   within the scope of their employment or agency.

## 5. Right to Revoke

The Company has the right to revoke the grants made in this Agreement
as to future Contributions at any time by written notice to the
Maintainer. This revocation does not affect the rights granted for
Contributions already submitted and incorporated into the Work.

## 6. Disclaimer

The Company is not expected to provide support for its Contributions,
except to the extent the Company desires to provide support. Unless
required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, the Company's
Contributions are provided "AS IS" without any warranties or
conditions of any kind, either express or implied.

## 7. Miscellaneous

1. This Agreement is governed by the laws of India, without regard
   to its conflict of laws provisions.

2. Any dispute arising from this Agreement shall be resolved in the
   courts of [Your City, e.g., Bangalore], India.

3. This Agreement is the entire agreement between the Company and
   the Maintainer regarding the Company's Contributions.

4. If any provision is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions
   remain in full force and effect.

5. The Maintainer may update this CLA from time to time. Continued
   submission of Contributions after an update constitutes acceptance
   of the updated CLA.
